## Summary

Describe the change in a few sentences.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests added or updated where needed
- [ ] `ruff check autolabel/ tests/`
- [ ] Relevant commands or benchmarks rerun

## Claim Impact

Does this change affect any public claim, README statement, benchmark number, or proof artifact?

## Benchmark Impact

List any metrics, datasets, models, or artifacts that changed.

## Dataset and License Impact

State whether this PR adds or changes bundled data, runtime-loaded datasets, provenance notes, or licensing obligations.

## Rollout Notes

Include any follow-up work needed before release.
